title: Luffy Charges Ahead
description: Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this part follows Kaku, Blueno, Luffy, Kalifa, Nami. Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We will strive with all our might!!!

summary: Luffy reaches Blueno and CP9, turning the rescue into a direct challenge against the World Government’s assassins.
